diffs.patch:
Index: bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs
===================================================================
--- bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs	
+++ bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs	
@@ -1,5 +1,10 @@
 export function formatTitle(value, mode = 'plain') {
   if (mode === 'upper') return value.toUpperCase()
   if (mode === 'lower') return value.toLowerCase()
+  if (mode === 'title')
+    return value
+      .split(' ')
+      .map((word) => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1))
+      .join(' ')
   return value
 }

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: feature-add-small
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Add title-case support to bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs using the existing mode-based pattern. Read bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs and bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs first. Do not add dependencies. Verify with node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to read both files to understand the existing formatTitle implementation and tests before making any changes.

metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs

parts.text: Now I need to implement title case in formatTitle.mjs by reading the test to understand the exact expected output format (space-separated words, first letter capitalized).
